untranslatable_reason: Pattern-specific requirements cannot be fully encoded: (1) 'Twin-Peak (Eve & Eve Double Top) Pattern' detection requires multi-bar pattern recognition not available in indicator set; (2) 'Wait for breakout confirmation before entering' requires pattern completion logic; (3) 'Bear market context' filtering requires regime detection beyond simple price comparisons; (4) Stop placement and target price computation marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no fallback rules provided; (5) Exact peak identification and pullback threshold detection require candlestick pattern analysis
translation_notes: Signal requires pattern recognition capability (identifying double-top formation with two peaks and valley). Breakout confirmation typically means close below the valley support. Used pivot point as a proxy for support level in the structured rule, but this is a simplification. The 65% failure rate (non-confirmation) and 72% success rate in bear markets should be used for position sizing and regime filtering. Recommend implementing pattern detection module separately or marking as manual trade signal.
